title: Corporate Secretary
summary: The governance administration leader responsible for board process, minutes, resolutions, registers, formal records, and traceability.
biography: This executive seat is available. Neuroartan has defined the Corporate Secretary role as a real operating standard before appointing a public holder.
The governance administration leader responsible for board process, minutes, resolutions, registers, formal records, and traceability.
The public profile is intentionally role-first until a human executive is hired, verified, and approved for publication.
mandate: Safeguard corporate record integrity so governance actions, approvals, filings, and institutional decisions remain auditable and controlled.
source_posture: Governed role placeholder for future executive hiring
